data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user decisions by minimizing choices presented.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI with dropdown menus and categorized navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs with efficiency by considering the size and distance of clickable items.
data.technical_spec: Uses large, easily clickable buttons especially on touch interfaces.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Ensures manageable chunks of information for memory processing.
data.technical_spec: Breaks down content into smaller sections using tabs and accordions.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements to improve user context understanding.
data.technical_spec: Aligns related icons and labels in close proximity to each other.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses efforts on the 20% of actions that drive 80% of outcomes.
data.technical_spec: Prioritizes high-impact features within the user interface.
